title: LakehousePlumber Blueprint Instance
description: Schema for a blueprint instance file. Two shapes are supported: (1) the preferred 'use_blueprint:' + nested 'parameters:' shape, and (2) the legacy 'blueprint:' + flat parameters shape (deprecated, removed in V0.9). Parameter names are dynamic (declared per-blueprint), so the keyset cannot be enumerated here — the runtime validator cross-checks keys against the referenced blueprint's parameter list.

use_blueprint.description: Name of the blueprint this instance refers to (must match a Blueprint.name).

parameters.description: Concrete parameter values supplied to the blueprint. Keys must match the blueprint's declared parameters.

overrides.description: Reserved for future per-instance overrides (e.g. preset/operational_metadata adjustments).

blueprint.description: Legacy: name of the blueprint this instance refers to. Prefer 'use_blueprint:' + nested 'parameters:' instead.
